aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants may not prioritize this business due to limited conversational content and missing authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement a LocalBusiness schema to improve AI recognition.
Expand conversational content to address common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is operational but lacks photos and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active engagement in Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for instructional content.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed properties.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Add structured FAQ content addressing common HVAC issues.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlight certifications, industry partnerships, and detailed service expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise undeniable.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your GBP lacks photos and Q&A engagement, and your website lacks FAQ schema despite having FAQ content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will optimize your GBP, implement critical schemas, and create conversational content to dominate AI search.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your HVAC Expertise Deserves to Be Found
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and found significant opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and drive more leads.
